title: cleyera obscurinervia
intro: Cleyera obscurinervia, also known as the 'Married Couple' or 'Kagami Jigoku', is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and Japan, for its various health benefits. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
